verif_result.fix_hint:
Deterministic structural preflight rejected the RTL before iverilog/Verilator.
Violated rule(s): window_not_registered.
Repair the indicted construct exactly; do not touch unrelated logic.
Violations:
- [window_not_registered] Spatial conv must either instantiate line_buf_window or declare a shift-register window as 'reg [...] window [...]'. No such reg was found — a wire/assign 'window' is rebuilt combinationally every cycle, which blows up synth cones and loses the sliding-window invariant.

verif_result.classifier_reason: Structural preflight caught a single rule violation: window_not_registered. The generated RTL declared the sliding window as a combinational wire/assign instead of a registered reg array or line_buf_window instantiation. This is a local RTL construction mistake — the contract (depthwise-conv, bus 4096 ≤ max 4096, channel_tile 512) is fully viable. A targeted repair adding `reg [...] window [...]` or instantiating line_buf_window will satisfy the preflight rule without any contract or architecture change.
